validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK, currently .NET 11 preview). Only net8.0/net9.0 restored. Local build needs targeting packs — CI is authoritative.

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate state-machine allocations in PropertyBag.Single<T>() and SingleOrDefault<T>()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: skip PropertyBag construction in BFSTestNodeVisitor when filter has no property expressions
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator state machine in PropertyBag.OfType<T>()

existing_branches.description: GetRetryAttribute + TryExecuteDataSourceBasedTestsAsync yield-iterator fixes (already pushed, no PR created)

open_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate LINQ closure allocations in TreeNodeFilter
open_prs.author: abdelghani-moussaid

backlog.title: PropertyBag.GetEnumerator() returns IEnumerator<IProperty> (boxes PropertyBagEnumerator struct). Return struct type directly for zero-alloc duck-typed foreach.
backlog.notes: Would eliminate last alloc in property filter path. Requires breaking public API change — not allowed by repo rules.

backlog.title: TestMethodValidator.IsValid: parameters.Any(p => p.IsOut || p.ParameterType.IsByRef) lambda — discovery path only, low impact
backlog.notes: Compile captures nothing so delegate is likely cached by JIT. Low impact — only called during test discovery.

notes.create_pr_tool_behavior: create_pull_request tool consistently fails to push branches directly. Returns 'success' with patch file path. Sometimes creates a tracking GitHub issue, sometimes does not. The branch itself must be pre-existing on remote or the tool must push — neither works reliably. The perf-assist/* branch naming scheme from a different workflow seems to persist properly.
notes.existing_branch_with_fix: perf-assist/avoid-yield-iterator-in-test-execution-hot-path-6eef29844b69afc9 has the GetRetryAttribute + DataSourceAttribute fixes already committed. A maintainer can open a PR from this branch directly.
notes.scan_2026-05-10: Fresh scan found no new high-priority opportunities. All major hot-path allocation issues addressed. Backlog is low-priority only. Perf Improver #8075 covers IsIgnored LINQ fix.
notes.sa1503_warning: SA1503: braces must not be omitted — always use braces even for single-statement if bodies.
notes.test_build_env: Local build fails NETSDK1127 (net8/net9 targeting packs not installed). Only net11-preview SDK available. CI is authoritative.
notes.treenodefilter_closures: Covered by community PR #8035 (abdelghani-moussaid). Open and awaiting review.
